title: Vanadium
description: A simple naive implementation for custom colors in resource packs with caching and blending
body:
# Vanadium ![You can use my code: theomenden to get 25% off your first month on a server!](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/06571c95-44fb-4192-87fd-5ec08cd0c08d.webp)
Quick Facts
  • 26th element on the Periodic Table
  • Vanadium gets its name from the Scandinavian goddess of beauty “Vanadis”. It was Nils Sefstrom who named the element.
  • Vanadium went through a few other names including panchromium and erythronium
Inspirations
  • Sodium Blending Registry
  • Better Biome Blend
  • Colormatic
Notable Changes
  • Allows you to use different types of custom color resource packs
  • supports "colormatic", "optifine", and "vanadium" color spaces in resource packs
  • caches colors and allows for smoother blending between different biomes, waters, and other areas.
**THIS MOD WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT INDIUM. Please include indium in your modlists.**
